name: lily-design-system-nunjucks-helpers
description: Lily Design System - Nunjucks helpers catalog (dev/test harness)

scripts.build: set -e; built=0; for d in lily-design-system-nunjucks-*/; do d=${d%/}; [ -f "$d/package.json" ] || continue; name=${d#lily-design-system-nunjucks-}; if [ ! -f "$d/$name.client.js" ] || [ ! -f "$d/$name.njk" ]; then echo "build: $d has package.json but no $name.client.js + $name.njk" >&2; exit 1; fi; tsup "$d/$name.client.js" --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir "$d/dist"; mv "$d/dist/$name.client.js" "$d/dist/index.js"; mv "$d/dist/$name.client.d.ts" "$d/dist/index.d.ts"; cp "$d/$name.njk" "$d/dist/"; built=$((built+1)); done; if [ "$built" -eq 0 ]; then echo 'build: no helper packages discovered' >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "build: $built helper package(s) built"

author: joel@joelparkerhenderson.com
